name: Cloverbelt
description_short: Cloverbelt Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Wausau, Wisconsin area with multiple branch locations and mortgage lending services.
description_long:
Cloverbelt Credit Union (CCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in Wausau, Wisconsin. The organization has been operating for at least 90 years, as evidenced by their upcoming 90th Annual Meeting scheduled for April 2026. As a credit union, CCU is structured as a cooperative where members are the primary stakeholders, distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks.

The credit union offers a range of financial services including checking and savings accounts (share accounts and share certificates), mortgage lending, construction loans, and consumer financing. They operate a dedicated Mortgage Center staffed with mortgage lending specialists who handle home purchase loans, refinances, and construction financing. Members can access online banking through CU-ONLINE, with options to enroll or reset passwords remotely. The institution emphasizes personalized service with branch-based lending consultations available across their service area.

Cloverbelt differentiates itself through multi-branch accessibility across Marathon County, Wisconsin, with locations in Wausau (two branches), Weston, and Mosinee. Their marketing emphasizes member-focused service with the tagline "Members Are Our Most Important Asset." The credit union actively promotes specific loan products, including construction loan specials and mortgage rate offerings, suggesting competitive positioning in their regional market.

As a credit union, Cloverbelt operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance and membership-based governance. The website provides limited details on APRs, fees, minimum deposits, or comprehensive product specifications. Potential members should contact branches directly for specific rates, terms, and membership eligibility requirements, as typical credit union membership often requires residence or employment in defined geographic or occupational categories.
services: Mortgage lending and home purchase financing
In-branch loan consultation and lending advisory
Mortgage loan origination through dedicated Mortgage Center
pros: Multiple branch locations across Marathon County (Wausau, Weston, Mosinee) for convenient access
Dedicated Mortgage Center with specialized mortgage lending staff
Online banking platform (CU-ONLINE) with remote enrollment and password reset capabilities
Member-owned cooperative structure with emphasis on member service and benefits
Construction loan specialization with marketed competitive rates
90+ years of established operating history in the region
NCUA-insured member accounts providing federal insurance protection
cons: Website provides minimal information on specific APRs, interest rates, or fee schedules
Limited detail on membership eligibility requirements or geographic/occupational restrictions
No information visible about Payday Alternative Loans (PALs) despite credit union category
Website lacks comparison tools, rate calculators, or detailed product documentation
No mention of insurance products, credit monitoring, or additional financial services typical of larger credit unions
best_for: Wisconsin residents in Marathon County seeking personalized mortgage and home lending services
Member-owners prioritizing local, community-based financial institution relationships
Home builders and construction loan borrowers in the Central Wisconsin region
diagnosis: Cloverbelt Credit Union is best suited for Wisconsin residents in Marathon County seeking member-owned financial institution services, particularly those interested in mortgage lending or construction financing. The primary caveat is that the website provides limited rate, fee, and product specification information—prospective members should contact branches directly for current offerings and membership eligibility requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
